hyperedges.label: Startup Sequence

hyperedges.label: CV Generation Pipeline
hyperedges.note: Phase 3 agents execute in order: parse -> analyze -> write CV+CL -> evaluate -> generate PDF

hyperedges.label: Dual Source Search
hyperedges.note: Both sources feed into dedup state stored in search_history.json

hyperedges.label: Group-CV Mapping
hyperedges.note: SPEC.md and CLAUDE.md both stress that CV-group mapping must never be mixed

Zenith Deutschland Application Bundle (CV Draft + Changes + Cover Letter)
Kinetic Archive Design System Applied Across All UI Pages
Candidate Core Differentiating Skills (PL-300, Customer Journey, Cohort Analysis, A/B Testing)
Kelebogie Batch 20260531: 3 Job Applications (CV + CL + Changes)
Leon Three Active Search Groups (da, pmo, pdm)

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Session startup instructions and agent behavioral rules for LinkedIn CV Agent. Defines startup sequence, execution flow, commands, and context management rules.

nodes.label: SPEC.md
nodes.description: Project specification for LinkedIn CV Agent. Defines core goals, functional requirements, architecture decisions, file structure, web UI specs, and known limitations.

nodes.label: UI.md
nodes.description: Visual design specification ('Kinetic Archive' design philosophy). Covers typography, color system, spacing, elevation, component specs, and layout details for all 4 pages.

nodes.label: memory/notes.md
nodes.description: Session notes and decision log. Records completed tasks, decisions made, issues found, and next steps for each session.

nodes.label: output/job_summary.md
nodes.description: Persistent job analysis summary table. 369 jobs analyzed across multiple groups. Master output file tracking all searched/analyzed vacancies.

nodes.label: ADAC_Marketinganalyst/cv_draft.md
nodes.description: CV draft tailored for ADAC Marketing Analyst role. Uses group-da CV base (marketing analytics profile). Data-driven analytics focus.

nodes.label: Bionorica-SE/cv_tailored.md
nodes.description: Tailored CV for Bionorica SE Marketing Analyst / Sales Analyst role. Emphasizes market analysis, Excel/PowerPoint, budget monitoring, and C-level reporting. Score 72.

nodes.label: Dahua-Technology-DACH/cv_tailored.md
nodes.description: Tailored CV for Dahua Technology DACH Marketing Specialist. Emphasizes B2B marketing, native Chinese C2 (key advantage for Chinese HQ), IoT/hardware product launches. Score 72.

nodes.label: Glow25_Senior-Marketing-Analyst/cv_draft.md
nodes.description: CV draft for Glow25 Senior Marketing Analyst. E-commerce funnel and campaign ROI analytics focus.

nodes.label: All_for_One Analytics Senior Consultant JD
nodes.description: Job description for All for One - Senior Consultant Business Analytics with focus on planning. SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere, SAP IBP. Requires German fluency, Controlling/BI expertise.

nodes.label: Intersnack Senior Business Transformation Analyst JD
nodes.description: Job description for Intersnack Group Senior Business Transformation Analyst. Process mapping, change management, IT solution design. English fluency required, travel ~4 days/week.
nodes.norm_label: intersnack senior business transformation analyst jd

nodes.label: Agent Execution Pipeline (Phases 1-4)
nodes.description: The 4-phase execution pipeline: Phase 1 CV parsing, Phase 2 search+JD analysis, Phase 3 CV+CL generation+evaluation+review+theme+PDF, Phase 4 summary.

nodes.label: config.json
nodes.description: Source of truth for keyword groups and CV file mappings. Contains keyword_groups[] with group_id, group_label, cv_file, primary_keywords (EN/DE), job_family (EN/DE).

nodes.label: group-da (Marketing Analytics)
nodes.description: Search group for Marketing Analytics / Data Analytics roles. CV file: my_cv_da.pdf. Active with 24+ jobs.

nodes.label: group-pmo (Project Management Office)
nodes.description: Search group for PMO roles. CV file: my_cv_pmo.pdf. Active with 27+ jobs.

nodes.label: group-pdm (Product Marketing Management)
nodes.description: Search group for Product Marketing Manager roles. CV file: my_cv_pdm.pdf. Active with 46+ jobs.

nodes.label: group-internal-marketing
nodes.description: Search group for Internal Marketing & Communications roles. CV file: my_cv_img.pdf. Draft status, no search results.

nodes.label: group-event-management
nodes.description: Search group for Event Management roles. CV file: my_cv_em.pdf. Draft status, no search results.

nodes.label: linkedin-scraper-mcp (uvx)
nodes.description: LinkedIn job search tool. Accessed via uvx. Used for dual-source search in Phase 2. Rationale: no official API needed.
nodes.rationale: Chosen because it requires no official LinkedIn API access.

nodes.label: mcp-stepstone HTTP SSE server
nodes.description: Local Stepstone job search tool at C:\tools\mcp-stepstone. Second job source covering DE major cities. Must be started manually before Phase 2.
nodes.rationale: Second job source to complement LinkedIn, covering German Stepstone platform.

nodes.label: output/search_history.json
nodes.description: Persistent deduplication state and batch index for job searches. Human-readable JSON, no database required.
nodes.rationale: Chosen over a database for readability and debuggability.

nodes.label: memory/progress.json
nodes.description: Structured state snapshot written at end of each session. Checked at startup to determine if session is first-time.

nodes.label: .claude/agents/Orchestrator.md
nodes.description: Full orchestration workflow document defining Phase 1-4 execution steps.

nodes.label: scripts/check.py
nodes.description: Sanity check script. Runs at startup. ERROR stops execution; WARN prompts user confirmation.

nodes.label: scripts/server.py
nodes.description: Web UI backend server running at http://localhost:8080. Implements REST API endpoints for jobs, status, cvfiles, group-stats, record, note, group-delete, group-dup. Also manages POST /api/search for triggering Claude Code subprocess.

nodes.label: scripts/gen_job_tracker_html.py
nodes.description: Generates static HTML template for job tracker UI at C:/Users/Leon/Desktop/job_tracker/index.html.

nodes.label: Web UI (Job Tracker)
nodes.description: 4-page web application: Page 1 Dashboard, Page 2 Job Detail, Page 3 Add Group (pending), Page 4 My CVs. 'Kinetic Archive' design philosophy.

nodes.label: Page 1 - Job Summary Dashboard
nodes.description: Main dashboard showing all analyzed jobs. 14 columns. Filters: group, source, score slider, date slider, application record. Skill Gap panel, Export CSV, Loading button for triggering searches.

nodes.label: Page 2 - Job Detail
nodes.description: Single job detail view. Shows score gauge, core responsibilities, culture keywords, matched/missing skills (6 categories), bonus skills, recommended emphasis, user notes.

nodes.label: Page 3 - Add Search Group
nodes.description: Form page for creating new keyword groups. Status: pending implementation. Navigation entry point disabled.

nodes.label: Page 4 - My CVs
nodes.description: CV-group management page. Shows all groups with stats, top missing/matched skills, search timeline. Implemented. Group cards with Search Jobs, Edit (disabled), Duplicate, Delete actions.

nodes.label: GET /api/jobs
nodes.description: Returns parsed job list from job_summary.md merged with jd_analysis.json files. Includes materials_ready, user_note, group_label, location.

nodes.label: GET /api/group-stats
nodes.description: Computes per-group stats: avg_score, top_missing_skills, top_matched_skills, last_search, is_active, search_timeline.

nodes.label: POST /api/search
nodes.description: Triggers Claude Code subprocess for job searching. Returns 409 if search already in progress. Streams logs via SSE.

nodes.label: PyMuPDF
nodes.description: Used for CV PDF parsing in Phase 1. Chosen for lightweight operation without LibreOffice dependency.

nodes.label: weasyprint + markdown + theme-factory
nodes.description: PDF generation pipeline. Pure Python, supports theming.
nodes.rationale: Pure Python approach supports theme selection.

nodes.label: Kinetic Archive Design Philosophy
nodes.description: UI design system concept: data-dense but lightweight containers. Uses tonal layering instead of borders, whitespace as structural element. No-Line Rule, Tonal Layering, Breathable Density principles.

nodes.label: Color System
nodes.description: Token-based color system. Score thresholds: >=70 green (High Match), 45-69 yellow (Good Match), 30-44 orange (Moderate), <30 red (Low Match). Source brand colors: LinkedIn #0077B5, Stepstone #F97316.

nodes.label: 6-Category Skill Classification
nodes.description: Skills classified into 6 categories: tools (sql/python/excel/powerbi etc.), academic (degree types), cert (PMP/certifications), langs (German/English etc.), domain (SaaS/B2B/agile etc.), soft (remainder).

nodes.label: Match Score System
nodes.description: Two-phase scoring: match_score_preview (fast keyword overlap for Phase 2 ranking) and precise score (calculated in Phase 3A by jd-analyzer). Score range 0-100.

nodes.label: jd_analysis.json
nodes.description: Per-job analysis output in each output directory. Contains score, core_responsibilities, culture_keywords, matched_skills, missing_skills, bonus_skills, required_skills, recommended_emphasis, company_info, application_record, user_note.

nodes.label: cv-evaluator agent
nodes.description: Evaluates generated CV on 3 dimensions: fabrication detection, word count check, JD coverage rate. FAIL forces revision, WARN requests confirmation, PASS proceeds.

nodes.label: cv-writer agent
nodes.description: Rewrites CV tailored to job description. Only adjusts wording and skill ordering; no fabrication allowed.

nodes.label: cover-letter agent
nodes.description: Generates 4-paragraph cover letter in English, max 400 words.

nodes.label: jd-analyzer agent
nodes.description: Analyzes job descriptions to produce match scores and skill gap analysis. Max 3 parallel instances to avoid UI lag.

nodes.label: cv-parser agent
nodes.description: Parses CV PDFs using PyMuPDF. Produces cv_parsed_<group_id>.json cache.

nodes.label: Output Directory Structure
nodes.description: Naming: output/<group_id>_<company>_<title>_<YYYYMMDD>/. Contains jd_analysis.json, cv_draft.md, cv_final.pdf, cover_letter_draft.md, cover_letter_final.pdf, cv_changes.md, eval_report.json. Temp files in output/temp/.

nodes.label: Search Deduplication Logic
nodes.description: Dedup by job_id + company + title (all three must match). Same company different title = kept. Noise filter: company='Share/Save/Apply' removed, description <150 chars triggers single retry.

nodes.label: Application Record (4-state)
nodes.description: 4 states: null (untracked), applied, interview, invalid. Legacy 'success' shown as Applied, legacy 'rejected' falls back to untracked. POST /api/record updates jd_analysis.json.

nodes.label: Session History (Sessions 26-32)
nodes.description: Recorded sessions: S26 new commands + cv-parser for group-pmo; S27 Stepstone MCP setup + group-da Stepstone search; S28 Web UI v3 restructure + Page 4 implementation; S29-30 Search button API integration; S31 group-pdm Stepstone search; S32 group-pmo Stepstone search.

nodes.label: Work: Hapag-Lloyd AG (2024-2025)

nodes.label: Work: HSBC Strategy PMO (2021-2022)
nodes.description: Strategy Project Management Officer. USD 8M digital transformation programme. Budget dashboards, 6 workstreams, C-suite reporting, cross-functional bridge.

nodes.label: Work: Intelligent Power Corporation (2020)

nodes.label: Work: GRG Banking Corporation (2019)
nodes.description: Product Marketing Manager. ATM manufacturing. 6 product lines portfolio analysis, 100+ B2B client interactions, EMEA/APAC campaign monitoring.

nodes.label: Work: Moli Media Corporation (2019)
nodes.description: Marketing & Project Coordinator. E-commerce live-stream. 4000+ attendee events, KOL tracking, post-event analytics.

nodes.label: Work: ECE Group Hamburg (2024)

nodes.label: Student Consulting: VfB Stuttgart
nodes.description: Pro bono consulting project. KPI framework design, cost-benefit tracking methodology for sustainability projects.

nodes.label: Filter Persistence (localStorage)
nodes.description: Dashboard filter state persisted to localStorage key 'jt_filter'. Fields: activeGroup, activeSource, minScore, minDate, filterRecord, searchQuery.

nodes.label: Skill Gap Panel
nodes.description: Collapsible panel on Page 1 showing word-cloud of top missing skills across filtered jobs. Font size 11-25px based on frequency. 6-category grouped. Only skills with count > 1 shown.

nodes.label: Loading Button (Search Trigger)
nodes.description: Button on Page 1 that triggers job search. Posts to /api/search, or falls back to clipboard copy. Polls /api/status every 5s to detect data refresh.

nodes.label: Search Timeline
nodes.description: Per-group search history showing last 3 searches. Format: date · new_net new · fetched_total fetched (sources). new_net = new_total - hidden_low_score - skipped_duplicate.

links.note: CLAUDE.md instructs reading SPEC.md on first session for architecture background
First startup step: read memory/progress.json to determine session type
Second startup step: read memory/notes.md for decision history
Third startup step: read config.json as source of truth for keyword groups and CV mapping
Fourth startup step: run python3 scripts/check.py sanity check
Full execution flow defined in .claude/agents/Orchestrator.md
SPEC.md cites UI.md for visual design spec of Web UI
SPEC.md defines config.json as source of truth for CV-group mapping
SPEC.md names linkedin-scraper-mcp (uvx) as LinkedIn data source
SPEC.md names mcp-stepstone local HTTP SSE server as Stepstone data source
SPEC.md specifies PyMuPDF for CV parsing
SPEC.md specifies weasyprint + markdown + theme-factory for PDF generation
SPEC.md defines output directory naming and structure
SPEC.md defines deduplication logic: job_id + company + title must all match
SPEC.md contains Web UI functional specification (routes, API endpoints, data sources)
SPEC.md defines two-phase scoring: preview vs precise
UI.md defines the 'Kinetic Archive' design philosophy
UI.md defines full color token system and score color thresholds
UI.md defines classifySkill() 6-category rendering rules
UI.md specifies Skill Gap Panel layout and word cloud rendering
Session 29-30 notes document the /api/search SSE implementation in server.py
server.py parses job_summary.md for /api/jobs
job_summary.md score cells link to jd_analysis.json files
Bionorica Marketing Analyst is a group-da job (marketing analytics)
Dahua is a PDM/B2B marketing role requiring Chinese language advantage
Glow25 Senior Marketing Analyst is a DA group role
All for One analytics role is in group-da (DA = data analytics)
Intersnack business transformation analyst appears in group-da output directory
server.py reads config.json for group labels and writes via group-delete/group-dup
Page 4 allows duplicate and delete operations on config.json groups
Jobs found for group-da produce output directories with jd_analysis.json
Hapag-Lloyd data tracking and agile delivery supports DA group applications
HSBC PMO role (USD 8M, 6 workstreams, C-suite) is the primary credential for PMO job applications
IPC Marketing Manager role (4 product launches, GTM, 4.6M CNY) is primary credential for PDM applications
server.py serves the static HTML and all API endpoints for the web UI
server.py reads jd_analysis.json (merge into /api/jobs) and writes application_record and user_note via POST endpoints
gen_job_tracker_html.py generates the static HTML that forms the web UI shell
group-stats endpoint reads search_history.json to build search_timeline[] per group
Loading button POSTs to /api/search with group_id, or falls back to clipboard copy
Score thresholds map to color assignments in the UI
cv-evaluator runs after cv-writer + cover-letter complete, before PDF generation
KOL/cohort analytics at Moli positioned as analogue to UA/LTV analytics required by SOFTGAMES
HSBC dashboard work and C-suite reporting used as primary BI credential evidence
cv_changes explicitly states PL-300 is a genuine differentiator against other applicants
SQL, Adjust, AppsFlyer explicitly acknowledged as gaps in cover letter
HSBC attribution analytics cited as most directly relevant experience for Zenith
Hapag-Lloyd QA/tracking discipline cited as evidence for Zenith tracking/QA requirement
Both CVs draw on same underlying experience pool but with different framing emphasis
Both analytics-oriented CVs from same candidate, analytically framed but with different JD-keyword priorities
PUMA targets ops/coordination angle vs analytics angle for SOFTGAMES
Both analytics roles but SOFTGAMES emphasises audience/cohort/UA analogue while Zenith emphasises attribution/QA/tracking

hyperedges.note: Both sources feed into dedup state stored in search_history.json
